title: King's Skyblock
description: Fabric skyblock pack made to run out of the box, some mods emulating plugin utilities such as commands & Island creation
body:
Fabric loader skyblock modpack focused around Create and Ex Nihilo, fairly balanced, some recipes are still WIP as I add ways to get some cosmetic items in a skyblock format. 

Decoration mods to go with Create and some server functionality such as commands like island creation and teleports make it a great pack to play with friends or on a server. 

Pack comes pre-installed with the popular client-sided mods~~, see the King's Skyblock [LITE] pack to get a version without the client sided mods.~~ [[Pack is mid-update, LITE version will be outdated temporarily]]

Figura installed! Best mod Ov O 



Bugs are to be expected! I'm no expert when it comes to datapacks and making servers, but so far in playtesting, no game breaking issues yet! Feel free to join the Bioship discord @ https://discord.gg/pj4F2F4T to join our community
